name: hpt-su
description: Search the hpt.su registry of Russian/EAEU vehicle compliance documents (type approvals ОТТС/СБКТС/ОТШ, conformity certificates, declarations, СУТ type-approval notifications).
long_description: MCP server that connects any MCP-compatible AI assistant to https://hpt.su — an aggregated database of Russian Federation and Eurasian Economic Union vehicle compliance documents. Search vehicle type approvals (ОТТС, ОТШ), safety-of-design certificates (СБКТС), conformity certificates and declarations under TR CU / TR EAEU technical regulations, and type-approval notifications (СУТ). Requires a Bearer API key from a hpt.su account with an active API_TIER subscription.

api_key.title: hpt.su API key
api_key.description: Bearer key from the hpt.su cabinet (requires active API_TIER subscription).

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Fetch a single Document by UUID.

tools.name: search_safety_reports
tools.description: СБКТС / СУТ / ЗОЕТС / ЗОТШ / ЗОТТС feeds.
